patterns.adapter_pattern: Adapters use nu scripts with signature: <workdir> <prompt_file> <stdout_log> <stderr_log> [memory_out]. Exit codes: 0=success, 75=rate-limit/transient, 1+=failure
patterns.test_pattern: Nushell test scripts use 'use std/assert' and return nothing on success, error on failure
patterns.build_pattern: make check = cargo test + cargo clippy + cargo fmt --check

existing_implementations.description: test-real-adapters.nu already exists and tests claude, ollama, and codex adapters end-to-end through the dispatcher pipeline. It creates temp dirs, initializes .cards structure, writes templates, creates cards, starts dispatcher, and waits for card completion.

task_context.spec_003_context: Spec 003 updated the prompt template in test-real-adapters.nu to be more explicit about using the Write tool
task_context.blocked_subtask: Running the claude adapter test end-to-end and confirming it exits 0
